zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Bulstrode於1450年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾潔利 迪恩時，她的父親Richard Bulstrode31歲，母親Alice Knyffe26歲。她於1480年與Sir Thomas Peniston在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Bulstrode于1450年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾潔利 迪恩时，她的父亲Richard Bulstrode31岁，母亲Alice Knyffe26岁。她于1480年与Sir Thomas Peniston在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Bulstrode was born in 1450, in Hedgerley Dean, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Richard Bulstrode, was 31 and her mother, Alice Knyffe, was 26. She married Sir Thomas Peniston in 1480, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Bulstrode est née en 1450, à Hedgerley Dean, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bulstrode, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Knyffe, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Peniston en 1480, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Bulstrode 1450 in Hedgerley Dean, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Bulstrode 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Knyffe 26. Sie hat 1480 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Peniston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Bulstrode è nata il nel 1450 nel Hedgerley Dean, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Richard Bulstrode, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice Knyffe, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Peniston nel 1480, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Bulstrode(이)가 1450년 영국 벅잉함실르 헤저리 디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Bulstrode(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Knyffe(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Sir Thomas Peniston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Bulstrode nasceu em 1450, em Hedgerley Dean, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bulstrode, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Knyffe, tinha 26 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Bulstrode родилась в 1450 г. в местности хеджирли дин, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Bulstrode было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Knyffe, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Peniston в 1480 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Bulstrode nació en 1450, en Hedgerley Dean, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bulstrode, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Knyffe, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Peniston en 1480, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
